examples: He put Elizabeth's motel bill and airfare on his expense account.
His abhorrence of racism led him to write "The Algiers Motel Incident."
She found a small, inexpensive motel on the outskirts of the town; it was barren and unlovely.
As we drive back through the valley to our motel, the nothing-something paradox prods at me.
After dinner I sit behind the motel by myself, watching the sun drop behind the bluffs.
